landing.hero_title: Master Medical Education with MD Exam
landing.hero_subtitle: Your comprehensive platform for medical exam preparation, flashcards, and interactive learning.
landing.cta_title: Ready to Transform Your Medical Education?
landing.features_subtitle: Comprehensive tools designed to help you ace your medical exams
landing.testimonials_subtitle: Hear from our community of successful medical professionals
landing.pricing_subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your study journey
landing.cta_subtitle: Join thousands of medical professionals already mastering their exams
landing.feature_0_desc: Thousands of exam-style questions with detailed explanations and clinical pearls
landing.feature_1_desc: Spaced repetition flashcards optimized for long-term retention
landing.feature_2_desc: Expert-led video lectures on high-yield medical topics
landing.feature_3_desc: Comprehensive courses designed by board-certified physicians
landing.feature_4_desc: Track your progress with detailed stats and insights
landing.feature_5_desc: AI-powered study plans tailored to your exam date
landing.testimonial_0_text: MD Exam transformed my board preparation. The question bank is unmatched in quality and depth.
landing.testimonial_1_text: The spaced repetition flashcards helped me memorize complex topics effortlessly. Game-changer.
landing.testimonial_2_text: Best ENARM prep platform I've used. The analytics helped me identify and fix my weak areas.
landing.faq_0_q: How does the question bank work?
landing.faq_0_a: Our question bank contains thousands of exam-style questions organized by specialty and topic. You can study in Study Mode with instant feedback and explanations, or Exam Mode for timed simulation.
landing.faq_1_q: What is spaced repetition and how does it help?
landing.faq_1_a: Spaced repetition is a scientifically proven learning technique that schedules reviews at optimal intervals. Our SM-2 algorithm ensures you review cards right when you're about to forget them, maximizing retention.
landing.faq_2_q: Can I access content on mobile?
landing.faq_2_a: Yes! Our platform is fully responsive and works seamlessly on all devices. Mobile app coming soon.
landing.faq_3_a: Absolutely. We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee on all plans. If you're not satisfied, we'll refund your purchase — no questions asked.

guides.page_subtitle: Role-based guides to help you make the most of the platform
guides.admin_subtitle: Tools and workflows for platform administrators

getting_started.title: Getting Started
getting_started.description: Create your account, choose your exam, and set up your study preferences to begin your medical exam preparation journey.
getting_started.step_0: Register with your email and password or sign in with Google
getting_started.step_1: Verify your email address (check your inbox)
getting_started.step_2: Select your target exam (ENARM, MIR, USMLE, PLAB)
getting_started.step_3: Set your study preferences and daily goals
getting_started.step_4: Explore the dashboard to see your overview and quick actions
getting_started.step_5: Start a study session with the question bank
getting_started.step_6: Use the timer feature during practice exams
getting_started.step_7: Review your progress charts in the Progress page
getting_started.step_8: Contact support if you need help

question_bank.title: Question Bank
question_bank.description: Practice thousands of exam-style questions with detailed explanations, organized by specialty, topic, and difficulty level.
question_bank.step_0: Go to Questions from the sidebar
question_bank.step_1: Use filters to narrow down by exam, specialty, topic, or difficulty
question_bank.step_2: Click any question to open it in study mode
question_bank.step_3: Read the question and select an answer
question_bank.step_4: Toggle the answer to see if you were correct and read the explanation
question_bank.step_5: Track your accuracy and progress per topic in the Progress page

exam_mode.title: Exam Mode
exam_mode.description: Simulate real exam conditions with timed mock exams. Track your performance and review your answers afterward.
exam_mode.step_0: Navigate to Exams from the sidebar
exam_mode.step_1: Select a mock exam (e.g., ENARM, MIR, USMLE Step 1)
exam_mode.step_2: Click Start Exam to begin the timed session
exam_mode.step_3: Answer each question within the time limit
exam_mode.step_5: View your exam history to track improvement over time

flashcards.title: Flashcards (Spaced Repetition)
flashcards.description: Review flashcards using the SM-2 spaced repetition algorithm for optimal long-term retention.
flashcards.step_2: Click a due card to flip it (front to back)
flashcards.step_3: Rate how well you remembered: 0 (forgot) to 5 (perfect)
flashcards.step_4: The system calculates the next review date based on your rating
flashcards.step_5: Review due cards daily to build long-term memory

video_classes.title: Video Classes
video_classes.description: Watch expert-led video lectures organized by modules. Track your watch progress and pick up where you left off.
video_classes.step_0: Go to Videos from the sidebar
video_classes.step_1: Browse the module library with embedded Cloudflare Stream player
video_classes.step_2: Click a lesson to start watching
video_classes.step_3: Progress is tracked automatically — resume anytime
video_classes.step_4: Use the sidebar to navigate between modules and lessons

courses.title: Courses
courses.description: Enroll in structured courses with modules, lessons, quizzes, and certificates.
courses.step_1: Click a course to see details, modules, and lessons
courses.step_2: Enroll (free or paid depending on the course)
courses.step_3: Work through each module and lesson sequentially
courses.step_4: Complete lesson quizzes to test your understanding
courses.step_5: Finish all modules and pass the final quiz to earn a certificate
courses.step_6: View your certificate in the dashboard

progress.title: Progress & Analytics
progress.description: Track your performance across all study activities with detailed charts and statistics.
progress.step_1: See your overall stats: questions answered, accuracy, study streak, total hours
progress.step_2: View the weekly activity chart to see your study pattern
progress.step_3: Check accuracy by specialty to identify weak areas
progress.step_4: Review your streak calendar for the last 30 days

subscription.title: Subscription & Billing
subscription.description: Choose a plan that fits your needs. Upgrade or downgrade anytime with prorated billing.
subscription.step_0: Go to Subscribe from the sidebar to see available plans
subscription.step_2: Pay via Stripe secure checkout (credit/debit card)
subscription.step_3: After payment, your subscription activates immediately
subscription.step_4: To upgrade or downgrade: visit Subscribe page and select a new plan
subscription.step_5: Proration: unused portion credited toward new plan
subscription.step_6: Downgrading gives you a credit applied to your next invoice
subscription.step_7: To cancel: click Cancel Subscription at the bottom of the Subscribe page
subscription.step_8: Your access continues until the end of the current billing period

content_management.title: Content Management
content_management.item_0: Create and manage courses with lessons and quizzes
content_management.item_1: Add, edit, and organize question bank by specialty and topic
content_management.item_2: Upload video content and manage the video library
content_management.item_3: Oversee flashcard decks and their assignment

user_management.title: User Management
user_management.item_0: View and manage all registered users

system_administration.item_3: View analytics dashboard for platform metrics

translations.title: Translations & Localization
translations.item_0: Add and edit translation keys in the admin panel
translations.item_3: Ensure content is available in all supported languages

platform_administration.title: Platform Administration
platform_administration.item_0: Full access to all admin features

security.title: Security & Compliance
security.item_0: Monitor user authentication and session activity
security.item_1: Oversee role assignments and access control

infrastructure.title: Server & Infrastructure
infrastructure.item_0: Monitor server health and performance metrics
infrastructure.item_1: Manage file uploads and CDN configuration
infrastructure.item_2: Review error logs and system alerts

advanced_config.title: Advanced Configuration
advanced_config.item_0: Configure email templates and notification settings
advanced_config.item_1: Manage Stripe integration and payment workflows
advanced_config.item_2: Set up AI-powered features and auto-translation
advanced_config.item_3: Customize landing page and marketing content
